data.q: Which keyword is used to define a class in PHP?
data.e: Classes in PHP are declared using the class keyword.

data.q: Which keyword is used to create an object from a class?
data.e: The new keyword creates an instance of a class.

data.q: What does the public visibility modifier mean in PHP?
data.e: Public properties and methods can be accessed from any scope.

data.q: Which visibility modifier restricts access to the same class only?
data.e: Private members are accessible only within the class where they are declared.

data.q: What is the purpose of the protected visibility modifier?
o: Restricts access to static methods only
Allows access within the class and child classes
data.e: Protected members are accessible inside the class and subclasses.

data.q: Which method acts as a constructor in PHP?
data.e: __construct() is automatically called when an object is created.

data.q: What is constructor property promotion introduced in PHP 8?
o: Declaring and assigning properties directly in constructor parameters
data.e: Constructor property promotion reduces boilerplate by declaring properties directly in constructor parameters.

data.q: Which example correctly uses constructor property promotion?
data.e: PHP 8 allows visibility modifiers directly in constructor parameters for automatic property creation.

data.q: What does inheritance allow in object-oriented programming?
o: One class acquiring properties and methods of another
data.e: Inheritance enables a child class to reuse and extend functionality from a parent class.

data.q: Which keyword is used to inherit a class in PHP?
data.e: The extends keyword is used for class inheritance in PHP.
